# PHProjectTextElement.ElementType.subtitle

**Case**

An enumeration to denote subtitle text in the header view.

## Declaration

```swift
case subtitle
```

## Types of Text Elements

- **PHProjectTextElement.ElementType.body**: An enumeration to denote body text.
- **PHProjectTextElement.ElementType.title**: An enumeration to denote title text in the header view.

items.description: An enumeration to denote body text.

items.description: An enumeration to denote title text in the header view.
